creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #1)
> <grumble>
> seriously, please stop putting "[maintainer]" in the title when you aren't
> already the maintainer.  This is the second time I've asked.

Sorry. This is what I have always used in the past, given it is
maintainer related (request for maintainer).
I thought it pertinent. Would you prefer [maintainer request]?
or ???

--Chris
